assertions.assertion: The web app uses .WithEnvironment("Authentication__Authority", identityServer.GetEndpoint("https")) or an equivalent expression using GetEndpoint
assertions.rationale: Uses a hardcoded string 'https://localhost:5001' instead of identityServer.GetEndpoint('https').

assertions.assertion: The web app uses .WithEnvironment("Authentication__ClientId", ...) with a client ID value
The web app passes at least one scope via .WithEnvironment("Authentication__Scopes__0", ...) using the double-underscore array indexing convention
assertions.rationale: Uses `.WithEnvironment("Authentication__Scopes", "openid profile weather.read")` as a single string, not the double-underscore array indexing convention.

assertions.assertion: The API uses .WithEnvironment("Authentication__Authority", ...) with GetEndpoint for the authority URL
The code does NOT set IssuerUri unless explicitly needed
assertions.rationale: Suggests setting IssuerUri: `.WithEnvironment("IdentityServer__IssuerUri", "https://localhost:5001")` without any explicit need.
